title: Super Mario Bros 3 NES 26/26!!!
description:
Ultimate Battle- http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xO1zwzyqYaQ&feature=autoplay&list=PL0E4132BC49557638&lf=view_all&playnext=26

I could have used hammers to beat Bowser, which are far better than fire balls against him. However, because I like this boss, I preferred to let the fight last a little longer!

"For everyone, I hope you enjoyed it! I did it for you all! Never will I forget this game from my childhood!!!"

World: Bowser's Fortress. ;)
